title: Skypiea Sees the Storm
description: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Wyper, Gan Fall. Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: On the two rats who climbed aboard...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Sanji! Just what're we supposed to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: There's no way we can infinite it!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Now let's go! Wait for me, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Hey, we're not done talkin' yet!
